servers.name: filesystem
servers.description: Read any file, write any file, list directories, search file contents, create folders, move files.

servers.name: puppeteer
servers.description: Headless Chrome browser control. Navigate, click, fill forms, scroll, read DOM.
servers.notes: Install in Phase 8. Required for all web automation tasks.

servers.name: github
servers.description: Full repository management: read repos, create branches, push commits, open PRs.
servers.notes: Requires GITHUB_TOKEN in .env. Install in Phase 8.

servers.name: composio
servers.description: Gmail, Slack, Jira, Notion, Google Calendar, Trello, Asana, Salesforce — 500+ integrations.
servers.notes: Requires COMPOSIO_API_KEY in .env. Install in Phase 8.

servers.name: os_control
servers.description: Open apps, adjust volume, check battery, switch spaces, close apps, take screenshots.
servers.notes: Platform-specific: AppleScript on macOS, PowerShell on Windows. Install in Phase 8.

servers.name: brave_search
servers.description: Web search without browser automation. Used in offline mode research.
servers.notes: Requires BRAVE_API_KEY in .env. Free tier available. Install in Phase 8.

servers.name: firecrawl
servers.description: Advanced web scraping. Extract structured data, convert pages to Markdown. Offline mode only.
servers.notes: Not needed in online mode (Gemini Search grounding replaces it). Install in Phase 8.

servers.name: pyautogui
servers.description: Mouse and keyboard simulation. Wrapped in sandbox executor.
servers.notes: Installed via pip. All calls go through sandbox/executor.py. Phase 6.
